# Encounter Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-06-02

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.x (frontend and backend), Node.js 20 LTS + React (CSR UI), React Router, Express, Mongoose, bcrypt, JWT/session middleware, Zod/JOI-style request validation (001-encounter-crud-auth)
- MongoDB (users, encounters, monster catalog) (001-encounter-crud-auth)

- C# 12 on .NET 8 (LTS) + ASP.NET Core MVC, Razor Views, Bootstrap 5, Entity Framework Core, EF Core SQLite (001-encounter-forge-mvp)

backend/

tests/
